title: Real Life UFO Experts Say Spielberg Captures Reality In ‘Disclosure Day’
description: But the reviews for ‘Disclosure Day’ among the experts on UAPs—unidentified aerial phenomena—are decidedly mixed.

title: Trump Administration Establishes UAP Governance Board with Harvard's Avi Loeb Leading Science Council
description: The White House has formed a new UAP Governance Board and accompanying Science Advisory Council under Avi Loeb to advance President Trump's transparency agenda on unidentified aerial phenomena, focusing on scientific analysis, interagency coordination, and national security implications.

title: Trump creates UFO panel to be advised by Harvard’s Avi Loeb
description: The freshly minted UAP Governance Board met for the first time on Tuesday “to support the President’s directive on UAP transparency,” according to the Office of the Director of National Intelligence.

title: New UAP panel to advise feds: ‘A completely different mindset’
